theme_and_archetype.description: Joyful, safe, and professional aesthetic designed for parents but inspired by children. Uses bright, organic shapes, bouncing animations, and rounded soft UI to communicate a premium yet deeply playful kindergarten environment.

backgrounds.blobs: Soft radial gradients combining primary red (at 5% opacity), lime green (at 10% opacity), and butter yellow for playful, organic backgrounds.

layout_spacing.grid_strategy: Bento-style grids for Programs and Gallery sections. Mix of tall, wide, and square cells to create visual tension and playfulness instead of boring uniform rows.

components_styling.borders: 2px solid transparent, hovering to border-lime-500/20 on cards.

buttons.primary: bg-[#C8161D] text-white hover:bg-[#A61217] rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-bold shadow-lg transform transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1
buttons.secondary: bg-[#9DC41E] text-white hover:bg-[#86A917] rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-bold shadow-lg transform transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#1A1A1A] text-[#1A1A1A] hover:bg-[#1A1A1A] hover:text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-bold transition-all

motion_and_animations.hero_entrance: Spring bounce effect for text and images. Delay children staggered by 0.1s.
motion_and_animations.hover_states: Cards lift up (-translate-y-2) with expanded soft shadows.
motion_and_animations.scroll_reveal: Fade up with slight scale (0.95 to 1) utilizing `whileInView`.
motion_and_animations.micro_interactions: Icons within buttons bump to the right on hover. Testimonial carousel uses smooth pan transitions.

hero.description: Happy kids learning and creating art in a classroom
hero.usage: Main Hero Section Image - Home Page

global.header: Sticky glassmorphism header (bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md) with Logo, Links, and primary CTA (Enroll Now).
global.footer: Dark mode footer (bg-[#1A1A1A] text-white) with colorful accent blob, quick links, social media icons, and newsletter signup.
global.whatsapp_button: Fixed bottom-right floating button using Lime Green (#9DC41E) with bounce animation for quick inquiry.
global.icons: Use lucide-react (Smile, BookOpen, MapPin, Phone, Mail, etc.)

home.hero: Two-column or asymmetrical layout. Left: H1, Subtitle, CTA buttons. Right: Main image with rounded-3xl and overlapping floating geometric shapes (circles, blobs in red and lime).
home.highlights: 3-4 key features (Safety, Expert Teachers, Play-based) in bento-grid cards with colorful icons.
home.programs_preview: Grid showing top programs, hovering scales the card.
home.testimonials: Carousel of parent reviews with 5-star ratings.
home.gallery: Masonry or bento grid of happy children photos.

about.story: Rich text block about the school's origin, accompanied by side image.
about.mission_vision: Two beautifully styled cards with different background tints (red-light, lime-light).
about.history_timeline: Vertical timeline component indicating milestones, using alternating sides and animated connecting line.

programs.layout: Detailed grid of preschool, after-school, and summer camp options. Each with age group labels, curriculum details, and 'Learn More' buttons.

admissions.timeline: Step-by-step horizontal or vertical process (Inquiry -> Tour -> Application -> Enrollment) using numbered circles.
admissions.form: Enrollment inquiry form (using shadcn-like clean inputs). Must have client-side validation and success state.

team.teacher_cards: Grid of teacher portraits. Hover animation reveals their qualification or favorite children's book.

blog.grid: Clean grid layout showing latest updates, parenting tips, and school events. Each card has a category tag.

contact.form: Input fields (Name, Email, Phone, Message). Must show a 'Thank you!' success message upon submission.
contact.info: Map placeholder (or embedded Google Map), Phone, Email, Address styled cleanly in a sidebar next to the form.

technical_instructions_for_main_agent: Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing.
Use Framer Motion for all route transitions and component reveals.
Create a custom background utility class in CSS for the 'blobs' to avoid heavy image loading, using radial-gradients of #C8161D and #9DC41E at low opacities.
Do not use TypeScript, use plain .jsx/.js files as per standard setup.
Follow the generous padding and typography rules strictly to maintain the 'premium preschool' aesthetic.
